items.headline: Oil Jumps As Trump Says Mulling Restart Of Project Freedom, Which Could Mean New Hormuz Clashes With Iran
items.summary: Trump mulls restarting Project Freedom in Hormuz and says forcibly retrieving 'nuclear dust' is still on the table, oil jumps on the headline.

items.headline: Pakistan scrambles to salvage US-Iran diplomacy as ceasefire faces collapse
items.summary: Pakistan rejects allegations of aiding Iran militarily while Trump says truce on 'life support'.

items.headline: US envoy admits Israel secretly sent Iron Dome to UAE during war on Iran
items.summary: Israel secretly deployed Iron Dome missile-defense batteries and troops to the United Arab Emirates during the war against Iran, says the US ambassador to Israel, revealing deepening military cooperation between the occupying regime and the monarchy.

items.headline: May 12: Iran's strategic edge widens as top officials warn US against new military adventurism
items.summary: Iran's strategic upper hand is becoming increasingly visible, as the United States finds itself in a ring of fire with no viable options or leverage to advance its agenda.

items.headline: Accept Iran's rights or face repeated military defeats: Defense Ministry
items.summary: Iran's Defense Ministry says the American-Zionist enemy must accept the legitimate and definitive rights of the Iranian nation, or expect to suffer repeated defeats both on the diplomatic front and on the battlefield.

items.headline: Second Qatari LNG Tanker Crosses Strait of Hormuz
items.summary: A second Qatari liquefied natural gas (LNG) tanker has successfully crossed the Strait of Hormuz under a special arrangement involving Iran and Pakistan, highlighting efforts to maintain energy shipments despite regional conflict risks.

items.headline: Trump Says USA-Iran Ceasefire is on 'Massive Life Support'
items.summary: 'I would say the ceasefire is on massive life support where the doctor walks in and says, 'sir, your loved one has approximately a one percent chance of living',' U.S. President Donald Trump said.

items.headline: US releasing 53mn barrels from strategic oil reserve to mitigate fallout from war on Iran
items.summary: The United States is releasing 53.3 million barrels of crude oil from its Strategic Petroleum Reserve to energy companies in an attempt to calm global markets shaken by the war against Iran and the disruption of shipping through the Strait of Hormuz.
